name: MAINZ BIOMED N.V.
summary: PART I General Historically, we have developed and sold in-vitro diagnostic (IVD) tests for the early detection of cancer. In March 2025, we acquired a license from Liquid Bioscience, Inc. to access a portfolio of novel mRNA biomarkers and AI developed proprietary algorithm, for the non-invasive detection of pancreatic cancer with a blood test. We have an exclusive license to develop such a test using these biomarkers and algorithm with the unilateral option to acquire them. We are also developi...
